title: Melancranis contorta
taxonomy: Melancranis contorta is a moth species, belonging to the family Erebidae. It is classified within the subfamily Herminiinae. The exact classification of Melancranis contorta may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered to be a member of the order Lepidoptera. Lepidoptera is a large and diverse order of insects that includes butterflies and moths. This classification indicates that Melancranis contorta is a type of moth that belongs to a specific family and order within the Lepidoptera group.
